sections.paragraph:
Original: נגח

Transliteration: nâgach

Phonetic: naw-gakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to push, thrust, gore
    1. (Qal) to gore
    2. (Piel) to push or thrust at
    3. (Hithpael) to engage in thrusting, wage war

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1291

Part(s) of speech: Verb
